title: Anebulo Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (214.F) stock price, news, quote and history
full_text: This Yahoo Finance page provides detailed information on Anebulo Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (214.F), including its current stock price (0.7450 EUR, down 29.72%), news headlines, historical data, and performance overview. The company's stock has shown significant negative returns YTD, 1-year, and 3-year periods compared to the S&P 500. The article also lists top gainers, losers, and most active stocks on the UK markets.
